displayTitle: The High Republic Adventures Phase III #14
synopsis: Fighting erupts on Eriadu! After months of oppression by the dastardly Nihil, valiant partners Lula and Zeen lead the charge against the occupying force. Meanwhile, a hidden danger stirs beneath the battlefield that threatens to turn the tide of the war, but in whose favor? The fate of the galaxy is on the line as the final arc of The High Republic Adventures begins! • The final arc begins here with the first of four connecting covers (Cover A), that will create a spectacular landscape piece!
title: The High Republic Adventures Phase III #14
